metadata.source_file: Modbus TCP IP Communication Protocol V22 for TnerX_0.5p &TnerS 20251019.pdf
metadata.document_title: Modbus TCP/IP Communication Protocol for CATL Energy Storage Container Products (TenerS & TenerX-0.5P)
metadata.extraction_note: This JSON was extracted from the V22 PDF tables and normalized to the same top-level hierarchy and row field names as the provided V17 JSON. PDF table merged cells may still require manual verification; raw_columns is retained for traceability.

sbmu_summary_messages.comment: Platform Reserved signal
Customer Reserved signal

All cells: M*N (max 576) M: number of CSC N: number of cells per CSC 1#CSC cells voltage: 0x480 ~ (0x480+N- 1) 2#CSC cells voltage: (0x480+N) ~ (0x480+2N-1) …… M#CSC cells voltage: (0x480+(M-1) *N) ~ (0x480+M*N-1)
raw_columns: All cells: M*N (max 576) M: number of CSC N: number of cells per CSC 1#CSC cells voltage: 0x480 ~ (0x480+N- 1) 2#CSC cells voltage: (0x480+N) ~ (0x480+2N-1) …… M#CSC cells voltage: (0x480+(M-1) *N) ~ (0x480+M*N-1)

sbmu_detail_messages.comment: Each byte represents one temperature point, Low byte means odd number temperature points, High byte means even number temperature points, Numbers count from one All cells temperature sensors: M*P (max 416) M: number of CSC P: number of temperature sensor per CSC 1#CSC temperatures: 0x6c0 ~ (0x6c0+P/2-1) 2#CSC temperatures: (0x6c0+P/2) ~ (0x6c0+P-1) …… M#CSC temperatures: (0x6c0+(M-1) *P/2) ~ (0x6c0+M*P/2-1)
raw_columns: Each byte represents one temperature point, Low byte means odd number temperature points, High byte means even number temperature points, Numbers count from one All cells temperature sensors: M*P (max 416) M: number of CSC P: number of temperature sensor per CSC 1#CSC temperatures: 0x6c0 ~ (0x6c0+P/2-1) 2#CSC temperatures: (0x6c0+P/2) ~ (0x6c0+P-1) …… M#CSC temperatures: (0x6c0+(M-1) *P/2) ~ (0x6c0+M*P/2-1)

sbmu_detail_messages.comment: All cells: M*N (max 576) M: number of CSC N: number of cells per CSC 1#CSC cells balance status: 0x790 ~ (0x790+ceil(N/16) -1) 2#CSC cells balance status: (0x790+cell(N/16)) ~ (0x790+2*cell(N/16) -1) M# CSC cells balance status: (0x790+(M-1) *cell(N/16)) ~ (0x790+M*cell(N/16) -1)
raw_columns: All cells: M*N (max 576) M: number of CSC N: number of cells per CSC 1#CSC cells balance status: 0x790 ~ (0x790+ceil(N/16) -1) 2#CSC cells balance status: (0x790+cell(N/16)) ~ (0x790+2*cell(N/16) -1) M# CSC cells balance status: (0x790+(M-1) *cell(N/16)) ~ (0x790+M*cell(N/16) -1)
